field.label: HTTP Deep Inspection
field.help: Enable deep inspection of HTTP traffic for malware, injections, and suspicious content.

field.label: HTTPS Inspection
field.help: Enable HTTPS traffic inspection. Requires SSL inspection to be enabled and properly configured.

field.label: FTP Protocol Inspection
field.help: Enable inspection of FTP traffic for malicious file transfers and suspicious commands.

field.label: SMTP Email Inspection
field.help: Enable inspection of SMTP email traffic for malware attachments, spam, and phishing attempts.

field.label: DNS Traffic Analysis
field.help: Enable DNS traffic analysis for DNS tunneling, malicious domains, and suspicious queries.

field.label: Industrial Protocol Inspection
field.help: Enable inspection of industrial protocols (Modbus, DNP3, OPC UA, etc.) for SCADA/ICS security threats.

field.label: P2P Traffic Detection
field.help: Enable detection of peer-to-peer traffic and file sharing protocols.

field.label: VoIP Protocol Inspection
field.help: Enable inspection of VoIP protocols (SIP, RTP, etc.) for security threats.

field.label: Custom Protocol Detection
field.help: Define custom protocol signatures for detection (one per line, regex format).
